name: Glass Bowl Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz package of frozen peas, thawed
6 strips of bacon, cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart clear glass serving bowl, layer the first six ingredients in the order given.
2. Combine the mayonnaise and sour cream until smooth; spread evenly over the salad.
3. Cover and chill overnight.
4. Sprinkle with bacon just before serving.
